Game.Name: Adventures of Yogi Bear (USA)
Game.plot: Overview:The Adventures of Yogi Bear is a side-scrolling platformer featuring the Hanna Barbera character as he hunts various locations for picnic baskets and to stop industrialists from turning Jellystone Park into a chemical dumping zone.Players guide Yogi through several stages starting at Jellystone Park, while hopping on or dodging skunks, snowmen, and other cutesy enemies. The objective is to gather picnic baskets on each stage and reunite with Ranger Smith and Boo Boo.The game was known simply as Yogi Bear for its Japanese Super Famicom version, and Yogi Bear's Cartoon Capers for the European SNES version.Cheat: Level SelectEnter the following code at the Title Screen.... Up - Right - Down - Left Y - B - Up - Right - Down - Left - B - Y - Up - Right - Down - Left - Start
Game.Notes: Here comes Yogi! America's favorite cartoon bear is coming to the Super Nintendo Entertainment System. Help Yogi Bear make his was past the furry denizens of Jellystone Park. Collect picnic baskets and other goodies as you travel through the different areas of the park in an attempt to save Jellystone from industrial developers.
